description:
ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance: A complete guide #icicilombard #healthinsurance 
0:00 Introduction
1:05 Special Revolutionary Add on covers
5:37 Claim settlement ratio, network hospitals, claim process
6:38 Sum assured, Pre & post hospitalisation, day care, ayush treatment, 
7:28 Road ambulance, Surrogacy Cover, Ocsyte treatment, Restoration.
8:28 Cumulative bonus, Bariatric Surgery, Wellness program, Modern treatments.
9:41 Claim protector, Inflation protector, Air ambulance, Room rent capping.
10:47 Compassionate visit, Maternity cover, Durable medical equipment's.
11:30 New born baby cover, vaccination, Annual health check up, Be fit, Tele consultations.
12: 40 Add ons
13:02 Discounts
13:40 Basic features
15:10 Premiums
Looking to learn more about ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance? This complete guide has everything you need to know about this health insurance plan.
ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance: A complete guide

https://youtu.be/Almh6I_hKc8

customercare@insuranceseva.com
Toll free no- 18008900455
tags: best health insurance company in india

comments.text:
लेकिन एक टाइम बाद ICICI बैंक add on का charge इतना बढ़ा देगी कि वो आप afford नहीं कर पाओगे और फिर जिस भी renewal पर आपने उस particular add on का premium नहीं भरा तो सब कुछ Zero हो जाएगा।
फिर आपकी सारी मेहनत बेकार , आपने इतने सालों तक बेनिफिट्स के चक्कर में add on का जितना भी प्रीमियम भरा वो भी बेकार।

सिर्फ पछताने के सिवाय हाथ में कुछ नहीं रहेगा फिर आप सोचोगे अब मैं कोई और कंपनी में पॉलिसी Port करा लेता हूँ। कंपनी शुरू में लालच देती है ताकि customer को product बेचा जा सके, और एक बार जब आप फंसे फिर कंपनी कस्टमर को अपने हिसाब से नाच नचाती है और यदि आप कंपनी के हिसाब से नहीं चले तो आपकी पूरी पॉलिसी आपके किसी काम की नहीं रहेगी।👎

comments.text:
Icici lombard: Very bad company for at least Health insurance. I am a customer since 2015 and only one claim taken in 2024 of rs approx 60000/- as claim amount was less so approved smoothly. This year, I asked to increase base sum assured and inspite of repeated emails and even after complaint to IRDAI (useless body, only spending tax payer money, no control on insurance companies at all, may be mili bhagat), no response by the company even 2 days before due date of renewal (so that, I am not having any chance of negotiating with company and has to accept there monopoly), suddenly got a call from an executive or agent that my base sum assured increment proposal has been approved and I need to fullfill Kyc details with acceptance of declaration (mentioning everything related to medical, that u will see before buying new policy). I said that I will pay hefty premium for increased base sum assured and u need to drop an email stating that my family will be covered till new policy is issued by company as this process will take one week time, but clearly denied, so it is one sided offer not thinking from client perspective.
Everytime, sales person or an agent will threaten you that calls r getting recorded.
Finally, I paid renewal premium as of last year sum assured (not accepted their one
comments.author: @gagrawal2050

comments.text:
I have been a policyholder with United India Insurance for over 20 years, covering both myself and my wife. We're both over 65, and despite their attractive offers, ICICI Lombard refused to cover us after learning about my wife's past heart palpitations and my cataract surgeries.

They promote coverage for various conditions from day one but ultimately deny policies when health issues are disclosed. Based on my experience, I strongly advise sticking with your current insurer if you already have a policy. ICICI Lombard's promises seem misleading. For more details, feel free to contact me. 

Thank you.
comments.author: @mathewkuttypazhayamadomtho4725

comments.text:
This review details my experience with unexpected charges on my ICICI Lombard car insurance policy. While the initial premium for a 200,000 INR IDV (Insured Declared Value) seemed reasonable at 9211 INR, I was surprised and disappointed to learn of an additional 3800 INR charge for a simple RC (Registration Certificate) transfer.

Here's a breakdown of my concerns:

Lack of Transparency: There was no mention of this additional fee during the policy purchase process. This unexpected cost makes budgeting for car insurance difficult.
Questionable Value: The purpose and justification for a 3800 INR charge for an RC transfer seem unclear. It feels excessive for a seemingly administrative task.
This experience has unfortunately tarnished my initial impression of ICICI Lombard. While the initial premium was competitive, these additional charges raise concerns about transparency and value for money.
comments.author: @Taken991
